arts.ttl: “My head is at Fulham” – Marco Silva insists he’s focused on PL side amid Tottenham links
arts.sum: Marco Silva insists he’s committed to Fulham amid recent claims linking him to other clubs, including Tottenham Hotspur. On Sunday, Fulham suffered a 2-1 defeat to Chelsea in the league. After the tie, Silva had a chat with DAZN in Portugal and A Bola have relayed his comments. arts.ttl: Dele Alli sends three-word message to former Tottenham teammate
arts.sum: The Belgian international was one of the most naturally gifted dribblers the game has seen and in a post recirculated on social media by Alli, has one particularly impressive stat. His skill and talent was noticed by his teammates with many now recalling how Dembele was one of the most naturally gifted players they ever shared a pitch with, but despite his talent the international's skills seems to be all but forgotten.
